  as={"h1"}

>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/companies/{companyId}/grocery-list/{itemId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves the Grocery Item metadata associated with a specific company or supermarket branch based on unique Item identifier Item ID.
